Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kelly A. McMeekin, Esq. appeared for petitioner Nooshin Weber, the Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Alex Weber. Neither the GAL nor the minor were present at today's hearing.
Order waiving appearance of the Guardian Ad Litem and minor at today's hearing was filed on June 23, 2009.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $13,125.50.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Medical Expenses - N/A.
Costs - $6,562.50.

A net balance of $6,563.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Chase Bank, located at 9994 Scripps Ranch Boulevard, San Diego, CA 92131. NA., No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor and to Deposit Money into a Blocked Account were submitted to and signed by the Court.
